.file-embed.background: rgb(11, 37, 58) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.background: rgb(11, 37, 58) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.is-loaded.background: rgb(11, 37, 58) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.markdown-embed.background: rgb(11, 37, 58) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(1, 22, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(1, 22, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(127, 219, 202, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #0b253a 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#0b253a, color-mix(in srgb, #0b253a 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #0b253a 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#0b253a, color-mix(in srgb, #0b253a 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(1, 22, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(1, 22, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(1, 22, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(2, 19, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(2, 19, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(11, 37, 58) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(1, 22, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(2, 19, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(29, 59, 83) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(2, 19, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(95, 126, 151, 0.475) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(2, 19, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(2, 19, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(1, 22, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgba(95, 126, 151, 0.05) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(11, 37, 58) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
